// 01

About

HackHive is AITM Belagavi's flagship hackathon — a 24-hour innovation marathon where brilliant minds collide to build solutions that matter.

Whether you're a coder, a circuit hacker, a designer, or a dreamer — if you've got the drive to build something extraordinary, this is your arena.

Two tracks. Endless possibilities. One epic weekend — 21 & 22 March 2026.

📅
Event Date
21–22 Mar
📍
Venue
AITM Campus
👥
Team Size
2–4 Members
🏆
Open To
All Students
// 02

Tracks

💻
Track 01
SOFTWARE
Build apps, websites, AI models, or any software solution that tackles real-world problems.
  • Web & Mobile Applications
  • Artificial Intelligence / ML
  • Cybersecurity Solutions
  • Open Innovation
Register for Software →
⚙️
Track 02
HARDWARE
Design and build physical prototypes, embedded systems, or IoT devices that solve tangible challenges.
  • IoT & Embedded Systems
  • Robotics & Automation
  • Smart Devices
  • Circuit Design
Register for Hardware →

Getting Here
🚆 From Railway Station 4.6 km
Take an auto-rickshaw or cab from Belagavi Railway Station heading towards AITM. Approx. 15 min ride.
🚌 From Bus Stand 7.7 km
Board a local bus or hire an auto from Belagavi Central Bus Stand towards Savargaon Road. Approx. 25 min.
🏫 AITM Campus Destination
